fragments.pattern: Sonnet uses the wrong verb form when the correct form appears in the verse itself. Example: verse says 'mamumunga' but reflection writes 'makakapag-produce ng prutas' — English mix when pure Tagalog exists.

Prayer register inconsistency: shifts between formal plural address to God (kayo/inyo) and intimate singular (mo/iyong) within the same prayer. Filipino Christian devotional prayer should use one register consistently — intimate (mo/iyong) is strongly preferred.
fragments.example_quote: Huwag mo kaming hayaang maligaw... Ang inyong pakikipag-ugnayan

fragments.pattern: Unnatural reduplication or over-compounding of words that no native Tagalog writer would produce. Sounds machine-generated. Example: 'pagkakabukod-bukod' instead of 'paghihiwalay' or 'pagbubukod'.
fragments.example_quote: labis na pagkakabukod-bukod ng isang tao
